reason: Workflow 资产索引、pre-development checklist 与验证入口
Phase 0 顺序、AI gate、typed route 与 task lifecycle 主合同
Public closed-loop Skill registry、interface、runtime dependency 与分发合同
Deterministic Git executor/validator 与 prepare-task 边界
Base sync result、task-start context 与 evidence freshness 数据合同
Preset 层索引与安装验证入口
Canonical package、managed hash、platform distribution 与 update/reapply 合同
Dogfood overlay 同步、drift 与 sidecar 门禁
三份 README 的 public API、version 与 upgrade 文案要求
复用既有 base freshness core，避免 planner/executor/standalone 并行实现
Workflow、package、runtime、preset、docs 与 tests 跨层一致性
